{{Infobox artifact
| name = Spirit-seals
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Spirit-seals]] are rectangular sheets of paper with complex [[scripts]] used to weaken [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] suggests the gear [[Yerin]] needs might be a spirit-seal.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] have a stack of forty-eight spirit-seals.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] carries a stack of spirit-seals.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“I’m guessing the gear you need is a spirit-seal?”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
